description: Exclusive Weapons are powerful hero-specific weapons unlocked at 5 stars in Season 2 Polar Storm.
unlock_requirement: Hero must be at 5 stars (500 total shards from 0)

upgrade_levels.note: Exclusive Weapons can be leveled up using Exclusive Weapon Enhancement materials obtained from season events and the Alliance store.

general_advice: Do not chase Exclusive Weapon until your hero is already at 4 stars with Super Sensory active
Exclusive Weapon provides a large damage/survivability boost for the hero's primary skill
Prioritise Exclusive Weapon for your main attack hero first
Materials are scarce early in the season — save them for your primary hero
